final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand identity showcase for the "染秋 (RAN QIU)" autumn fragrance brand, displaying primary color, secondary color, and typography specifications.

Style/medium: needs an elegant brand identity aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a brand guidelines layout with three clear sections: primary color swatch, secondary color swatch, typography specimen
Subject: must include the brand name "染秋 (RAN QIU)" prominently
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, contemplative autumn atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs warm autumn tones inspired by osmanthus, persimmon, maple leaves, amber — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs refined, natural textures reflecting traditional dyeing aesthetics — exact material choice is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋 (RAN QIU)" / must include "桂花乌龙" / must include "琥珀枫叶" / must include "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: must preserve the brand philosophy of Eastern philosophy meeting seasonal transitions, traditional dyeing craft aesthetics
Avoid:
